title: HyperDirector Caption Timeline
description: Caption/subtitle timeline for a HyperDirector composition. Captions can exist independently of audio (text-only subtitles) or be aligned to audio segments in audio-manifest.json via segment_id. See rules/audio-director-rules.md R-AUD-08.

project_id.description: Project identifier. Should match brief.title and audio-manifest.project_id.

version.description: Semantic version of this caption timeline.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this timeline was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this timeline was last updated.

total_duration_ms.description: Total video duration in milliseconds. Sum of all scene durations. Used to validate that no caption extends beyond the video end.

default_language.description: Default BCP-47 language tag. Applies to captions that do not declare their own language.

captions.description: Ordered list of caption entries. Order should match timeline position (ascending start_ms).

caption_id.description: Unique caption identifier within this timeline. Use snake_case or kebab-case. Example: 'cap_scene01_01', 'cap-02-hook'.

segment_id.description: Optional reference to the corresponding segment_id in audio-manifest.json. Enables audio-caption sync validation (R-AUD-08). Leave empty for text-only captions with no associated audio.

scene_id.description: Storyboard scene ID this caption belongs to. Must match a scene.id in storyboard.json.

shot_id.description: Optional shot ID within the scene. Example: 'scene_01-shot-01'.

start_ms.description: Caption display start time in milliseconds from video start.

end_ms.description: Caption display end time in milliseconds from video start. Must be greater than start_ms.

text.description: Caption text to display. May include line breaks (\n) for multi-line display. Should match the corresponding audio transcript (R-AUD-08).

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for this caption entry. Inherits from timeline default_language if absent.

max_chars_per_line.description: Maximum characters per line for display. Used to validate wrapping. Recommended: 20–30 for zh-CN (subtitle safe zone), 40–60 for en-US.

line_count.description: Number of display lines. Most subtitle safe zones support 2–3 lines maximum.

emphasis.description: Optional list of words or phrases to emphasise visually (bold, highlight, colour accent). These are display hints for the composer, not the audio.

style.description: Optional visual style hint for this caption. 'highlight': accent colour; 'whisper': smaller/dimmer; 'shout': larger/bold; 'aside': secondary text style; 'warning': warning colour. Composer maps these to CSS classes.

notes.description: Free-text notes. Record timing decisions, line-break rationale, or known display issues.

captions.text:
你有没有想过
一个人就能做出专业级的产品演示视频？

HyperDirector 让 Hermes
直接从 brief 到渲染好的 MP4
全程 AI 辅助
无需代码，无需专业设备
captions.notes: Text-only caption; no audio segment for this scene
